name: Spider Bite
outcome: [AttackerName] moves in and bites [TargetName]'s shoulder with her fangs, but instead of feeling pain, a pleasurable heat starts to spread through [TargetName]!
miss: [AttackerName] moves in and tries to bite [TargetName]'s shoulder with her fangs, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to keep away from her mouth!
statusOutcome: As [AttackerName]'s aphrodisiac venom courses through [TargetName], it becomes harder and harder to focus on anything but pleasure...
